TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Nangnisalu = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Namasyacyu ka alang Nangnisalu. 205 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 649 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 63% niqan 407 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 37% niqan 242 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Rukai 52%, Paiwan 6%, Cou 1%, Amis 2%. = Pnyahan pnatas =
S.PHON: = naŋnisalu = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu namasjaʦju ka alaŋ naŋnisalu. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, ɾukai **%, paiwan *%, ʦou *%, amis *%. = pnjaħan pnatas =
S.FORM: = Nangnisalu = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Namasyacyu ka alang Nangnisalu. 205 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 649 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 63% niqan 407 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 37% niqan 242 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Rukai 52%, Paiwan 6%, Cou 1%, Amis 2%. = Pnyahan pnatas =
S.PHON: = naŋnisalu = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu namasjaʦju ka alaŋ naŋnisalu. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, ɾukai **%, paiwan *%, ʦou *%, amis *%. = pnjaħan pnatas =
